item.title: Kubernetes TLS Certificates Creation
item.author: Author
item.description: Generate Tools OpenSSL In this lecture, we will use OpenSSL. Easy-RSA OpenSSL CFSSL Generate Process Check CRT 1 openssl x509 -in /etc/kubernetes/pki/apiserver.crt -text -noout Generate Keys 1 openssl genrsa -out ca.key 2048 Certificate Signing Request 1 openssl req -new -key ca.key -subj "/CN=KUBERNETES-CA" -out ca.csr Sign Certificates 1 openssl x509 -req -in ca.csr -signkey ca.key -out ca.
